subject: [RFC PATCH 42/45] mm: page_alloc: cross-MOV borrow within tainted SPBs

2026-04-30.patch_summary: This patch introduces a new pass, Pass 2d, in the page allocation algorithm to borrow individual buddies from tainted SPBs' movable free list when other passes fail. This approach aims to reduce the number of times a fresh clean SPB needs to be tainted, which can lead to fragmentation and negatively impact anti-fragmentation invariants. The borrowed pages are used for non-movable allocations and returned to the movable list upon freeing, allowing compaction within tainted pageblocks until the allocation is freed.
